title: You are number one
wikitext:
[]: You are number one! Poll ended at Fri Feb 25, 2005 7:52 am Shinji 6

[]: "You are number one!"             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Nov 30, 2004 1:22 pm i was looking to MAGI's thread "Who's your favorite albino?" and it gave me an idea to make a topic about who do you consider the best pilot of Eva.. personally my vote goes to Asuka..her combat abilities are great-well maybe Eva-02 helps here too-and i like seeing that she pilots her Eva with determination and that she doesn't give up.. so what about you? p.s sorry if this have been posted before..

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 30, 2004 2:57 pm Asuka sucks ass compared to Rei! Rei is kool with here super awsome ultra mega rific dupper blue hair red eyes and nice curvy body with a kool blue ultra kool mega human with a big eye with and she who is part angel who takes orders and is starle or what ever and her pale skin which i wonder if it will get any dark er if she gets a tan but any way she lives by her self and can cook and dosent talk much or display emotion like any other human but still in any other way thats kool (big breath)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 30, 2004 6:52 pm Yui. Granted, it's her body, so she's not "piloting" anything, but it probably goes without saying that she has greater mastery over an Eva than anyone else. Asuka in #25' doesn't get any Brownie Points for "piloting", either. Kyoko was in an awakened state, but she was working with Asuka, as opposed to taking full control like Yui does.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Nov 30, 2004 7:47 pm Im all for Shinji withASuka being a close 2nd.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Tue Nov 30, 2004 9:24 pm It's clear that Asuka pretty damn good at piloting... at first. Yui's good at berserking, but she doesn't really keep her cool. Rei is generally mediocre most of the time. But Shinji: Shinji gets better than Asuka at synching, but he's not that good of a pilot. Not too much enthusiasm, or too much enthusiasm leading to his digestion. Basically, none of these pilots would have been picked if they went for an interview. Too many mental problems and all. But Asuka was a good pilot. After her fall, Shinji won by default. And he quit a few times. Poor Rei, though. :cry: She was average, if that's how you'd like to call it. (By the way, Yui, I think, wouldn't really count as a pilot. She WAS the evangelion in a sense.)

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Nov 30, 2004 10:23 pm well...Asuka had the best reflexes etc.. out of all of them...

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Wed Dec 01, 2004 5:33 am I always thought Shinji was the best, hands down. When he put his mind into piloting, he always got farther with the enemy than the others (remember episode 19?). And, much to Asuka's despair, she couldn't beat an angel and survive without his help at any point during the series. That's one of the reasons she gets depressed towards the end of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Dec 01, 2004 9:16 am yea...but he is also dependant on his mom's help...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Dec 01, 2004 2:36 pm But dident he not know that his mom was in the eva for a long while?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Dec 01, 2004 5:35 pm FOR GOD'S SAKE!!! Sorry, I had no intention of voicing my pick; I just got so depressed that I had to script my frustration.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Dec 01, 2004 5:47 pm Hex do you take anti-deppression pills?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Dec 01, 2004 6:29 pm No, when it gets too severe what I do is exit the Chit-Chat forums .

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Dec 01, 2004 6:47 pm heh heh yeah right

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Wed Dec 01, 2004 8:05 pm sadsadshinji wrote: yea...but he is also dependant on his mom's help...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 01, 2004 11:32 pm MAGI wrote: Yui's good at berserking, but she doesn't really keep her cool.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Thu Dec 02, 2004 12:29 am :x You just like to critisise me, don't you, Reichu? Revision: Yui's good at berserking, but doesn't really keep her cool whilst doing so. Also, you can't really depend on her all the time, because she isn't officially employed as a pilot. In a sense, she WAS the evangelion, so she can't qualify as a pilot, as the pilot is supposed keep the evangelion under control, in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Dec 02, 2004 9:53 am but still, the victory was taken by his mom, when she dissolved him in the entry plug... Rei didnt have enough of a sync ratio, and Asuka thought that the AT field was down, when it definately wasnt...if you look at how Asuka did early on, she has better piloting skills... Shinji's rage was the only thing that kept him going the the fight against zeruel...cause when his arm was blown off, he hardly noticed... if you compare that to when he had his arm "broken" in the first battle, you can see the difference

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 02, 2004 11:19 am MAGI wrote: :x You just like to critisise me, don't you, Reichu?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Thu Dec 02, 2004 2:38 pm Reichu wrote: Screw the pilots; the Evas have minds of their own, thank you very much.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 02, 2004 4:32 pm Dark FireStar wrote: Yeah so we should ask which is the better Eva or somthing?
